name: gander-vscode
description: The Gander dashboard inside VS Code — watch and control your Claude Code agents next to your editor and terminal. A thin wrapper around the same bridge the standalone web app uses (no app fork).

gander.url.description: URL of the running Gander bridge. Change only if you set AOC_PORT.

gander.autostart.description: If the bridge isn't reachable, try to start it from the repo (bridge/launch.js).

gander.bridgePath.description: Absolute path to the Gander repo's bridge/launch.js. Only needed if autostart can't find it (i.e. the extension isn't running from inside the repo).

gander.openOnStartup.description: Open the Gander panel automatically when VS Code starts.
